description: CompositionWhite striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has blue, green and coral pink stripes in various widths, short sleeves, patch pocket on the right chest with buttoned flaps and a curved hemlineFittingRegularWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak, bleach or wringDry flat in shade and set shape when wetModerate warm ironUpdate your preppy style with this striped shirt from probase.
